variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 4656 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO58950
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OT 4656 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO58950
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 4656 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO58950. Easy to install and replace, the OT 4656 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR/OIL SEPARATOR, Dimension 1 (D1): 400.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 355.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 263.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M8X1,25, Height 1 (H1): 360.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 350.0 mm
